Class CharacterData

java.lang.Object
Main.CharacterData
public class CharacterData extends Object
Stores all playable characters (Cookies) and pets available in the game.

This class acts as a central data holder for character selection. It provides predefined cookie and pet instances and keeps track of the currently selected cookie and pet used during gameplay.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Cookie
    BOBA_COOKIE
    Stores the BobaCookie character instance available for selection in the game.
    static final Pet
    Chilly
    Stores another reference to a Chilly pet instance.
    static final Pet
    CHILLY
    Stores the Chilly pet instance available for selection.
    static final Cookie
    CROSSIANT_COOKIE
    Stores the CrossiantCookie character instance available for selection.
    static final Pet
    LOCKING
    Represents a locked pet that cannot be selected until it is unlocked.
    static final Cookie
    LOCKING_COOKIE
    Represents a locked cookie character that cannot be selected until it is unlocked.
    static final Pet
    MOJI
    Stores the Moji pet instance available for selection.
    static final Pet
    SALAD
    Stores the Salad pet instance available for selection.
    static final Cookie
    TOMYUM_COOKIE
    Stores the TomYumCookie character instance available for selection.

  • Method Details

    • getCurrent_Cookie

      public static Cookie getCurrent_Cookie()
      Returns the currently selected cookie character.
      Returns:
      the current cookie used in the game

    • setCurrent_Cookie

      public static void setCurrent_Cookie(Cookie current_Cookie)
      Updates the currently selected cookie character.
      Parameters:
      current_Cookie - the cookie to set as the current character

    • getCurrent_Pet

      public static Pet getCurrent_Pet()
      Returns the currently selected pet.
      Returns:
      the current pet companion

    • setCurrent_Pet

      public static void setCurrent_Pet(Pet current_Pet)
      Updates the currently selected pet.
      Parameters:
      current_Pet - the pet to set as the current companion
